nodes.label: Bellsprout → Onix
nodes.note: Violet City — Kyle trades an Onix (nicknamed ROCKY ♂, holding a Bitter Berry) for your Bellsprout.

nodes.label: Abra → Machop
nodes.note: Goldenrod City — Mike trades a Machop (nicknamed MUSCLE ♀, holding a Gold Berry) for your Abra.

nodes.label: Krabby → Voltorb
nodes.note: Olivine City — Tim trades a Voltorb (nicknamed VOLTY, holding a PrzCureBerry) for your Krabby.

nodes.label: Dragonair → Dodrio
nodes.note: Blackthorn City — Emy trades a Dodrio (nicknamed DORIS ♂) for your female Dragonair. Held item disputed: Serebii lists a Bitter Berry, Bulbapedia lists a Smoke Ball.

nodes.label: Haunter → Xatu
nodes.note: Pewter City — Chris trades an Xatu (nicknamed PAUL ♂, holding a Mystery Berry) for your Haunter.

nodes.label: Dugtrio → Magneton
nodes.note: Kanto Power Plant — Forest trades a Magneton (nicknamed MAGGIE, holding a Mystery Berry) for your Dugtrio.

nodes.label: Chansey → Aerodactyl
nodes.note: Route 14 — Kim trades an Aerodactyl (nicknamed AEROY ♂, holding a Gold Berry) for your Chansey.
